---
title: "My Name is Red"
author: Orhan Pamuk
date: 2025-10-30
Rating: 9 / 10
---

### Highlights
> I don’t want to be a tree, I want to be its meaning.
> 
> **Início** (Location 886)

---

> “Blindness is silence. If you combine what I’ve just now said, the first and the second questions, ‘blindness’ will emerge. It’s the farthest one can go in illustrating; it is seeing what appears out of Allah’s own blackness.”
> 
> **Início** (Location 1068)

---

> ‘signature’ and ‘style’ are but means of being brazenly and stupidly self-congratulatory about flawed work.”
> 
> **Início** (Location 1167)

---

> brazenly used the perspectival method in the last picture. In this picture, objects weren’t depicted according to their importance in Allah’s mind, but as they appeared to the naked eye — the way the Franks painted.
> 
> **Início** (Location 7123)
